name: Neiman-Marcus Chili Con Queso (Tortilla) Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cans mild green chiles, drained and finely chopped (4-oz each)
4 cans plum tomatoes, drained, seeded, and finely chopped (14 1/2-oz each)
4 packages cream cheese, cut into bits (3 oz each)
8 teaspoons fresh lemon juice or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter over moderately low heat in a saucepan, stirring occasionally until onion is softened.
2. Add chiles and tomatoes. Cook mixture 8 to 10 minutes over moderate heat until liquid evaporates, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in cream cheese. Maintain moderate-to-low heat until cheese melts.
4. Stir in chicken broth, half-and-half, lemon juice, cayenne, and salt. Heat soup over moderate heat until hot, but do not boil.
5. Sprinkle tortilla strips, green onions, and Monterrey jack cheese over individual servings.
Makes 8 cups.
